title: Dil Ki Open Stage
desc: The host invites renowned individuals with different experiences to share their motivational stories that inspire and educate the audience.

title: Hanumaan Chalisa
desc: A religious leader recites the Hanuman Chalisa, a Hindu devotional hymn dedicated to Lord Hanuman and seeks his blessings.

title: Giri Bapu Shiv Katha
desc: A religious scholar delivers a discourse on Lord Shiva and urges devotees to lead a life governed by morals and embrace the righteous path.

title: Morarri Bapu ji Ram Katha
desc: Spiritual leader Morari Bapu delivers a discourse on Lord Rama and urges devotees to lead a life governed by morals and embrace the righteous path.

title: Vinod Aggarwal Bhajan Simran
desc: Vinod Aggarwal, a devotional singer, and devotees come together to sing songs and hymns in a bid to praise and worship the Almighty.

title: Sadhguru Ji Talks
desc: One of India's renowned spiritual leaders, Sadhguru, shares his knowledge of divinity and sanctity with the world.

title: Straight Talk
desc: The host presents some of the latest news stories, updates and events from the world of politics on a national and international level.

title: D Code : The Quotes
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: On Demand
desc: A comprehensive compilation of top Punjabi songs performed by various artists and singers as requested by the audience are presented.

title: World In Focus
desc: The host presents information about the social, economic and political issues of the day and provides updates on current events.

title: Prime View
desc: The host dissects the current headlines in the country and the world in a detailed manner and provides video footage to back the stories.
